understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' while avoiding spikes, using limited turns/attempts per level.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Grid-based movement with gravity (DOWN pulls/falls player vertically after tile removal or moves); horizontal MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x; CLICK removes targeted tiles (enabling falls/paths); spikes end run on landing; no undo observed; each action costs 1 step/turn.
